Off Calendar Dec-04-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/V. Mack CSR: V. Papale.
Appearances:
Jennifer Schildbach, Esq. for Plaintiff Graybar Electric Company, Inc.
Plaintiff's witness, Sherri Dukes also present, was sworn & examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, plaintiff's declarations, the Court rules in favor of the plaintiff and against the defendant Gildersleeve Electric, Inc. as follows:
Damages of $53,108.37
Attorney's fees of $660.00
Costs of $492.38
Interest of $6,334.17.
For the total of $60,594.92.
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-15-2003 Set For Trial On Apr-19-04 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On Mar-24-04 At 11:00 A.M. In Dept 306
